he17c6d4eg3311g43e8g8a73ga64ecd9df27e: I'm all chatted out, I'm afraid - though I may have a word with the chief.
h6122270dge004g4270ga607gf4609619f0d8: Dammit all. That goblin you killed in their camp - I had business with the bastard!
h534b4fa3g17e3g4fe2gb541g36e37807d0ea: Do you have to smash every roach you walk past?
hf111f3ecg5d3cg451ega598g9b8cde7ef52d: Forget it. We push forward, find a cure. We're a team, after all. At least till I hear different.
he26239f4ga3b6g4ec2g9deegfd695449c345: Besides, there are ways to make a roach's corpse talk.
ha32c8706g7108g431cg8b7fg1bdeb4336026: *A strange sensation courses through you, and your companion's mind unfolds, secrets half-revealed.*
h7ce0370eg5e47g4926gbcccg4a16ab37b03a: You came looking for someone named Mizora. Who is she?
h8df57237g8a25g4795g848cgf3831017764b: I... you're right. It's time you knew the truth.
h9fd84b24gcdf7g42d9ga1cagf91c52553200: We're not the only ones the mind flayers snatched up. They took a... an old flame of mine, too. Mizora.
hef4c634dge1c7g4199g8ffbgbb9a2495dd9b: Goblin called Spike dragged her from her squid-pod, roughed her up good.
hf52dc9ebg5017g4f38g8c59g07b38f37563b: Not the first time the bugger's given me trouble, either. We've got a history.
h3c768539g712fg4c63g868dgfd8217f961fa: I  know you want answers. Give me some time.
hfc29c68ageae0g4255ga0d1g51fa63433741: When I'm ready, I'll tell you what you want to know.
h973a90c5g570bg4e1bga18eg5edc651eab06: You need to level with me, Wyll. What business did you have with the goblins?
hdbab244bg1f6fg4ec1g98c5gc4bf50c2f50b: You need to level with me, Wyll. What business did you have with the goblins?
h341a6924g146ag45aeg8c4ag2a6631310218: Personal business. And for now, I'd like to keep it that way.
h172d6245g0ee6g41dfga4b3g62026c5b4b10: Explore his mind. What is he keeping from you?
h6a7d450cg0e4bg4e3bga771gdbb8df8b1cdd: *A single name soars from Wyll's mind to yours: 'Mizora'.*
h421bcfeegef2eg4e4fg9e65g7f91e0d3050e: *A shiver runs across your mind... you feel sated.*
hed6ca2dcgf1dag4779g8ce0g8ad0d831a0b2: Ouch. You could have warned me before you went poking in there.
hf8051d32gee8ag4011g8134g5dbd19112957: Well - I suppose it's time you knew the truth.
hbc0c105dg2eabg4ffbgad7eg12cbb1b443d2: *Something stirs deep within you, hungry and alert... it's taking something you'll never get back.*
h92a6177cg272fg428dgbde9g11fdaf33c9b5: *Your mind lurches, reeling suddenly as if... bitten.*
h1d6e029bg2ea3g401dgaf1cg2c67f893757f: *A shadow swims across your vision, and a familiar voice tells you to be calm. You are loved.*
h9d921834g5225g41afgaaf1g153ef80a58e8: *Your blood runs quicker, feeding the gnawing absence at the centre of your mind.*
h7f37a95cgfd0fg4babgbde8gbe613b05c7c4: *The presence deep in your mind is awake, unblinking. This is it. A single word pervades your consciousness: 'Soon'.*
hc7a46788g16b1g490fg903bgd9ac9ee33e21: *Your mind is full, bursting with ecstasy and terror. Finally, it is coming. You are becoming.*
hd55af70cgaeffg474agbcefgf410cb28182f: Explore his mind. What is he keeping from you?
h34eb33f6gf768g4a1dga50ag4c004c935553: How about you leave my mind alone?
h48847bacgc5afg45c4g84ebg06b82c9e5810: My business is personal. And for now, I'd like to keep it that way.
h0e9b94a0g1131g4bdagbed2ge015ac9ff4b1: Draw on the power within to enforce your will.
h473a5287g6871g4f43gbaeagcaddbd2d1079: *You focus on the source of the power, but it is quiet and still. It needs to rest.*
h09ead37cg769ag4c75g9a55gaa9ca4a3116a: Draw on the power within to enforce your will.
h0ec8bbcdgf44eg40e4g9eaag1220b9eabc23: Where did they take you, Mizora? And why won't you answer me?
ha76d45eege13dg4ddcga323ga00082b3fbf5: Forget it. We push forward, find a cure. We're a team after all. Even if it seems you forgot.
h38d58599ge91dg4e19gb85cg9028a3f1cdc6: Dammit all. That goblin you killed in their camp - you knew I had business with the bastard!
h0f0d5d78g6a4bg4992gaa1bg176d1fcef71f: Dammit all. One of those goblins you tore up? I had business with the bastard!
h1a692460g379bg46e8ga61agfff213cfdd66: Forget it. We push forward, find a cure. We're a team after all. Even if it seems you forgot.
h1343a56ag325fg4dffgb0cfga1d68cfcdd46: You went and killed Spike without me? If there were a tenth hell, I'd damn everyone to it. You have no idea what you've...
hdfe45ddag4dbag4800g98ccge69d9883c5a4: All that time, I reckoned Halsin held our cure. Seems the frontier's grown a few thorns.
hd0f12a26gaf64g478dg9c01g60074a9e95d9: The good news is we haven't gone full squiddie. Where a cure's concerned, I like our chances.
h7a5c0b01g4351g44dbg85dag131c2df0f2ee: All three leaders dead - a magnificent showing.
h2dd6219egaa7bg4cd1gb965gce54d7907249: The bards will carry your praises across Faerûn - hell, across all of Toril. And I'll be leading the songs!
h375b3085g0e5fg4713g9820gf3449348c0dd: The nights have been restless, but you don't look any worse the wear. Holding steady?
h0cfde805g1126g4634g8b08g791ee6a30a72: Steady as a rock, though my visitor is never far from my mind.
h18b6ee0eg282cg486cg9126g484779ba4802: A scent that strong'll stay with you. I suppose that's the point.
hf55e5989g753fg4c74ga85fg72b2037aa8f0: The lure of something more. More pleasure, more power. I know it too well.
h434c1977g190fg47d0g8913g2f5c6ab771e6: Day to day, month to month, Mizora would offer a taste - just enough to make me crave another.
hfa9bb631gbe00g474cga4f6gbe11d2650faf: A kiss, a touch, a victory. Minor gifts, with bigger ones always to come.
ha2d4aa55g64a7g46aag871ag9ac266decb43: My advice? When a tempting stranger offers you sweets, deny them. There's no cure for the poison inside.
ha89240a7g3e8ag4aa9g926agf6d574e2f0e3: I can't shake these visions. This apparition, its promises - I'm drawn to them.
h0a0727e7gd290g4e40g9340gf96876694608: I'm uneasy. Every day that passes, I feel less in control.
h9d061299gf9f5g4b22ga17fg99b9f99a5035: Our nights have gotten away from us, true. Yet we still speak our own words and march our own feet.
h54335b00gde2ag4e00gac9dg68e18bebf7cc: There'll come more promises, in both life and dream. Untold mysteries and powers just below the horizon.
hdc3e9cd3gf5edg4136gb03dg054393b2fa95: But we're still in command. When temptation strikes, we can always say 'no'.
h523435a6ge8c1g45bbg8bc5gb4836df966d9: I don't want to talk about this.
h7c519feeg0b67g4252g9515g396aa0fa0ea7: Fair. Anything else on your mind?
h049eb6aag3107g46d2g9bf3g73feca3955dc: Thank you. For understanding, I mean. You made me feel safe that night. For the first time in... maybe ever.
h4adab22dg3fe4g41e3g943bg080aa1939f1e: I won't forget it. Our night together, I mean. I can still feel your...
h2bddc211gb3b1g4b9ega868g9ef992139967: ... well. You know. What's on your mind?
h83b933a5gc807g4d1agabe9gfa80541759bd: Another triumph! Could any have doubted?
h698bddccg7acbg4bf6g883dg3e3a3111a26b: The frontiers are no longer mine to tame alone, friend - they bend for us both. Hail, and hail again!
hc06fc849g06e6g429dgbd70g891621cc67cf: The grove's in grave peril. It's up to us to defend it.
h73b3265fg3755g47bcg9c6fg69bbcebc9bc6: What do you make of Raphael?
h4ecc6503g0941g4fe5gbc7cg893165b95978: He brings to mind a story. 'The Devil With The Silver Tongue.'
h43fc8d4dg0998g44d8g9493g4f865e7f985a: An old fairy-tale my father read to me. The kind with a hero, a villain, and a moral.
hf6a0ede3gc270g4217ga1cbgd5715dfd70b6: A farmer made a deal with a devil, so the story goes: in exchange for the farmer's dearest fruit, the devil granted him a bottomless coinpurse.
h11cf868bgdfecg4354g8cefgfc94745c1783: The farmer's dearest fruit, naturally, was no apple nor peach, but his beloved daughter.
h9ba340c7g791eg4e9fg98abgf2203a321a25: We can learn a lot from fairy-tales, don't you think?
h0034669agd363g4b0ag97f8gd825cf75d61b: Do not trust a devil. Is that plain enough?
h41488fbbgb64dg482fg8057g23642bc80b87: Refuse him, no matter how tempting the offer, no matter how delicious the feast he lays out for you. The cost's always too great.
h39b0a3eag65bcg45a1g8367gbfdce94b65ec: He spoke of a cure. We have to at least hear him out.
ha54b23cdg3363g4a0fg8d62gf0987b1734ed: Take a single step towards him, and he'll dog you the whole journey.
h76bdb09bg73ceg4953g8f22gef3331f7d518: No cost is too great, if it rids me of this infection.
haf203243g3316g40dcgab4ag594905c4f5b0: Refuse him like you refused Mizora? Only, you didn't, did you?
h88ec7217g5101g48afg94f7g50c3ff1cccb6: I made a mistake. This is your chance to learn from it.
h722e1fb4ga956g483dgbc31g053742a01a0d: The devil made an empty promise. Our only hope lies with my people.
h5a5baffagf9c2g4629ga85ag7b629c5cecf4: A devil wouldn't bargain if he thought there was no chance of success, Lae'zel.
h71e7f2a0ga3dcg4020g8fcag0ad8113bb1ae: Trust me: He'll take what you're least ready to part with.
h1bff4cbbg96e9g4ef5g9b9cg50d027ee8760: You mean Raphael? We should at least consider his offer, given our circumstances.
hcb8c441eg7d55g417bgac07g8c35fda7d909: He'll require of you only what you're least ready to part with.
hd7582167g766cg4f51ga29fgcb7b93ad49b2: You might think you'd give up anything for a cure.
h635148e4gff21g46ffgb133g42fed01b9679: But the devil won't take just anything. He'll take everything.
hc50a68fbg1970g4bb0g9058g1635d141e2c6: Spare me the parables - I've no intention of bargaining with the likes of him.
h0bee1dbcg174bg4f9bg9d1dgcfc791ef86ee: That's because you still have hope. But when he becomes your last hope, remember this.
h19804099gc70ag4e2fgb217g8690c006d2a0: Interesting, coming from someone who's already been ensnared by a devil.
hba4ea71bgce11g4240g8800g0992f34c29f0: Who better to warn you of the danger ahead?
h7db1d2eeg9066g45b9ga9cfg6310ed689c36: I heard a woman's voice when our minds connected. Who is she?
h96cac145g831fg413cg8b50g1072fe705ea7: A woman? Why, who can say? I have tracked beasts with many a great hunter, and shared stories with many more.
h019bd972gbd16g4a39g86dageedd4cb3bf11: I have even shared my bed with a few. Allow me some modesty - some tales are the Blade's alone to treasure.
hfa8b448bg99ecg4590gabb8g4a1a27bdf85b: Only a matter of time before the goblins reach the grove. We need to act - we're those kids' only hope.
ha176ae28ge03fg46dag9ef7g92e51a42532d: The gobbo said Mizora's at Moonrise. I reckon it's time we paid a visit.
h9978c208g90b5g46d3gad9fg70a22d288f47: The drow took Mizora. So we push forward till we find her.
h0940d21dg8731g4017gb422gf45c4abfeff0: We should spring Halsin free too, see if he can cure us of these bugs. The goblins had to have penned him up somewhere.
h13e4b4beg23a1g451dga0a5gc7d392684220: If we're lucky, someone can pluck out these brain-bugs on the way.
h391fd22ag6720g48e1gaa16ge253ee4e5e87: Lae'zel's people might get it done. Gods know she sounds sure of it.
h39a2315fg756eg4290g9ea3gbe726164d664: Hm. Might be time to pay Ethel a visit.
h8458fb2agaca0g4141ga1a8gb7bcea99d6ac: I've got business with Spike in the goblin camp. Time I showed him what's what.
hb30d30e1g0842g413dgad6dgf06bfc08adbb: And we free Halsin while we're at it. We need a cure, and he's got the healing touch.
h1798b3fdg39a4g4fe2gab60g7672d9f32804: We sniff out the gobbo leaders and take their heads. And we free the druid Halsin while we're at it.
h34b840dfgdd20g41e0g8f11g5bdf3d29b488: If we want these brain-bugs removed, he's our man.
ha68e6cd7g1c20g43e0gb884g9bd293f63e7c: The tincture that squiddie Omeluum mentioned sounds promising, too. Who doesn't like mushrooms?
h183c4f1dge03bg45c1g912ag249163940aab: Failing that, this gith crèche sounds promising, if Lae'zel's telling us straight.
h7e9a8224g9563g455dgaa24gf7e514da09c5: I know, I know - that's a pretty big 'if'.
hb3d9db66gb47ag4605g8335ge755d0bd62e7: And don't forget Ethel. She knows something about tadpoles - we could pay her a visit.
h1c386513g38c3g4971ga553gf1f222bf7bc6: We sniff out the gobbo leaders and take their heads. That should clear the road of the buggers.
h0be8b03agf44cg4b8fgb78eg5682d8520d6c: We find someone to coax out our wriggly visitors. I've had just about enough.
hfec73dd2g63adg4860gb6fagf163c46dc27d: Lae'zel says a gith crèche is the answer. It's time we check it out.
h29d59efbgc1d2g4464gbd88ge720af3ebf22: You mentioned your father - said he had 'connections'. What did you mean?
h95866307g7a77g44dag8b43gbb823c995cb1: The Blade comes from noble stock, chief.
h54a4fabdg7237g4e31g9f2cg44aad16c25d0: Born in Baldur's Gate; bred in the Upper City. And a steadfast dagger in my father's side.
hcfcadb63g8d6ag4d67g82f4g13eefb6e8bc5: A different time. A different Wyll.
hb1736809g4e90g497ag99adg405ed3c331cb: Why did you leave noble life behind?
h9a249c86gc0c8g428cg838ag1e7bb128acfa: Always had a penchant for shiny things just out of reach. Inherited it from my old man.
hc2c47b23g235ag45e2g84d2gd52456854d31: Then I went thieving in the wrong shadows, got myself into trouble.
h85527126gae62g4be5ga898geb9ce31577f0: Father shipped me off to the Flaming Fist. Figured they'd teach me a few lessons.
ha0696505g85e1g4a0ag9739g4ee5658fd401: I've learned a few, all right. Just not the ones he expected.
h04fab6fdg0178g4b44gbd68g58c986077b4d: Your tone's rather pointed. Do you not care for your father?
ha3a29db0gc46eg4842g8453g1489acc3ad7b: Oh, you got me all wrong. Hell - the man was my hero.
h2c50705agbea7g4c6aga93fg1544e0e9541c: He saw whatever shiny bauble he wanted and took it. And my fingers were every bit as sticky.
h96a7276bg4c5fg4cc4g9f2agcc3012047a6c: Hardly surprising. You reek of privilege.
hd9102a02g1ea0g418dg9264g54787833425f: Privilege? Can't say you're wrong there. Always did have a taste for shiny baubles, same as my old man.
h92e3fba1g3ecdg4f43g876egeb7b17e1f5d1: My sticky fingers went grabbing all they could carry. Till they got the rest of me stuck.
h30673998g4ebeg450cgbe0dg9762b95bf593: I went thieving in the wrong shadows, got myself into trouble.
h7c6f378eg66c3g4d50gb5b0g787afd2b756d: You mentioned being a 'spoiled brat' at camp. How so?
hca3d6afagb7c4g49f5g9419g3d2125859e1b: An unusual name - 'the Blade of Frontiers.'
h75457856g8b7cg475cga4ccg8d61b75d4661: Slayer of spectres, killer of kobolds - the pride of Baldur's Gate.
had075b34gd8bbg4c52ga09fgaef11e7c84f5: So you know the stories! All true, I might add.
h3eb94c63gdd23g496dga100gb424c48595c7: Won't be long before they're telling new tales. Mind flayers, flying ships, dragon attacks - the legend grows!
h98db5b39g0670g42ceg8755g5827b018f6ca: The proof is in the pumpkin, as I'm sure someone once said.
h54f3e371g7565g4184ga702g70d6e7301e2f: If you don't know me as a hero already, then I'll prove myself one.
h4533adaag57f2g4495g8fbeg97449ae38650: Heh - am I supposed to be impressed?
h1461d345g40b5g4891g8e7aga9469782b164: If you'd heard the stories, you'd hardly doubt me!
h224a28cfg2199g4be5ga26ag2ffc1e8ceb5c: Is that so? Forgive me for not bowing.
h64f6dab2gb455g409cgb645g11a7f36ce2c5: Another great hero. We shall crush evil - together!
he97371fcga4dbg42e8gbf7agd78d309d02e3: Yes, yes. More grand epics for the bards to bellow!
he1a9cfc4g1375g41b2g8316gb715269f3112: A great hero? How exciting. Your exploits must be many!
hd9adb0b8g71a1g4927g9bdfg21d025318607: Countless, I assure you, and still their numbers grow.
h6abf7181ge301g49beg9b80gb8e341c6b14f: Mind flayers, flying ships, dragon attacks - the legend spreads 'cross the planes and beyond!
hd93e0073g4661g4433g8c6bg4d2b0eb72717: Ah, yes - I know of your exploits.
h7f6c7faagaca4g4da0ga399gcb28102a45ec: Ah, yes - I know of your exploits.
h87aaee05g72e4g4676gb851gc590d6cb621e: The esteemed Blade. Why, your reputation precedes you!
h8e5d4641ge04dg4dd6gb545g53d5f79b05ae: Dealing with the goblins - what's your plan?
h5a01cadcgf375g42abg859bg5842c8c78ede: There's an old saying I just made up: 'To fell a dragon, you must chop off its head'.
h3034e19egbc29g499dgaa4dgb6e5820cb67f: These goblins are organised. It's no hamhead pulling the strings.
hdfe69b5dg73cbg403fgaa4bgf60d6c7cdbce: We slither through their camp and off their leaders, quick as crickets.
h4aa2d216g71aeg43d2g9f13gfb3e94e8620d: I've tangled with the like before. Thick as planks. Keep smashing, and they'll splinter.
h6c60cdf5g4d32g4fcfg99beg57414b0d8b12: You seem eager to help the tieflings.
h9bc7f00ag928eg4608gaf0eg3d657a67b727: Did you see those tiefling kids back at the grove?
h4ea1aef9g9418g438egaa37g9cb9a7b420e0: They should be chasing frogs, climbing trees. Not training for battles they can't win.
he976165fg3c44g4f68g8138g34e637715a0c: Those people look at me, and they see a hero. Imagine how bad they'd feel if they were wrong.
h5a125facgfc9eg4426g85c4gf4691c54b642: Let us kick all goblin butts, not just leaders!
h7ff54fabge7b0g4bc9g8c42g7b9a3503494e: An elegant solution. A single strike, swift and sure.
h614803e6g1e47g4d55gb45dg07f3c9f099f2: Don't get me wrong - I like a good crash-and-smash. But we can't take the risk.
h6cec3427g498cg4b1eg9327g6e288e69bfa4: A few goblins is one thing. A horde's quite another.
h6f258f45g21cfg4f29gbabege2d93b30edfd: I like your style. Quick and efficient.
h7e02b662g0166g4955gbe85g3dcc57b0fd01: I do not 'slither'. I stride over broken skulls.
hc40763e2g2acdg4734gb7d7gd8cb76e34944: I like your way of thinking. The creatures are thick as planks. Keep smashing, and they'll splinter.
h335f5e79gc947g4e64g944fg4ddf73bde885: Risky, though. My gut says keep it simple. A few goblins is one thing. A horde's quite another.
hc6a5f6dfg202eg43d4g8c19gdc9e920edb4a: Your eye is... unusual. What happened?
h16d4da4age63cg497dg9b5bg52186c8dbc5e: Now, now - I always save the best stories for my closest friends and my cruelest enemies.
h8b92d6abgbfe7g4577g8f87g1fffae6fd6bd: Get to be one of those, and I'll spill the whole jug.
hf3742f65g4b0cg45cega017g16acafc54862: You get that, right? Spill the whole jug? Ugh - guess I'll toss that one on the heap.
h513e4b21g1c2ag4060ga3e7g3e09bb370b17: Lean in and examine the eye more closely.
h3d72a2b6g7012g46afg8492gfe8f9651b2fb: *Tiny grooves spider across the eye's surface. It resembles a sending stone, used to confer with distant contacts.*
hf1a4b020gf3adg4124gac52gacfb63e7e31e: Isn't your eye a sending stone?
h6910b6d3g5bcbg4487g9d32gbff98248fb15: A what now? Goodness, but it's just a bit of rock - nothing so special, I assure you.
h54227319g80adg4c04g8128gbb5eedef9f9a: *His breathing quickens; his jaw tenses. This legend is keeping something from you.*
h391feda0g136fg45f9gab5cg3ae7abb10095: *A strange sensation courses through you, and your companion's mind unfolds, secrets half-revealed.*
h29b3ae19g21c7g41bcg9da5g2dca1e961ec4: Enter his mind. What isn't he telling you?
h339cd546g9f30g4ed8g809cg6b95fbfcdf89: *A shiver runs across your mind... you feel sated.*
h3da57931gff9bg4930g9d74g784eaf36a432: *Your right eye vibrates and a woman's voice echoes in your head. 'Where in the Nine Hells have you been?'*
h1f2dd0c6g914dg4b35gae2aga1ad23bc98a1: Enough with the mind-poking. I told you - the eye's a rock, nothing more. And that's the end of it.
h9dc8fa78gf732g4a3ag80bfgaa7687e7440b: *Something stirs deep within you, hungry and alert... it's taking something you'll never get back.*
h4f0de93eg9323g4c2cg928egecc3f11185c4: *Your mind lurches, reeling suddenly as if... bitten.*
hb85ca830gf5b0g4e92g9360gcb289858b521: *A shadow swims across your vision, and a familiar voice tells you to be calm. You are loved.*
hb80b58b1geb1fg40d5gb976gf634a27c39dd: *Your blood runs quicker, feeding the gnawing absence at the centre of your mind.*
h46854957g3614g4c01g9df4g219d18aa156b: *The presence deep in your mind is awake, unblinking. This is it. A single word pervades your consciousness: 'Soon'.*
hf3e538a4g25a4g4bfdg8e7dgcc0d9da2369f: *Your mind is full, bursting with ecstasy and terror. Finally, it is coming. You are becoming.*
h2753193cgda32g426bga433gb7ad8cabfe47: Enter his mind. What isn't he telling you?
h415c5023gf356g4a87g9604g9f27c4d42c58: *You find only darkness. Wyll's thoughts are closed to you.*
he79f6fd4g7dacg4e06gb645g793857f11989: Now, now - no need to go mind-poking. I told you - the eye's a rock, nothing more.
h74b19403g7678g44d7g867fg8611ff556821: Draw on the power within to enforce your will.
h84d1e888g3fafg4c49g8e8cga51744a06d49: *You focus on the source of the power, but it is quiet and still. It needs to rest.*
h69ef4cceg91f4g49deg92bcg84b43f88c2f4: Draw on the power within to enforce your will.
hcaeb40dfg2a14g464bg85bcgcf104ae7467f: All right, then. Let's talk about something else.
hd10b49efg74e7g43abga504g62f45bf5390f: *You watch and listen for signs of deceit, but sense nothing unusual.*
h0dfe5ed9g730ag4f4fg9b79gb29e1dd77e24: You vex me, human. The situation is dire, but your spirits are high.
h6d8dd157g967fg44bega7bfg503656ff2ede: We could turn any moment. How are you in such good spirits?
he274d4b1ga08ag4d47ga8cdg58afcf83043e: Did you see those tiefling kids? Do you reckon our moping and muttering does them much good?
hf771bcb4g4c59g4d4egb1a5gcb7356b2d2e9: They should be chasing frogs, climbing trees. Not training for battles they can't win.
hb053d65cg2e2ag4300g95e5g497502710643: Those people look at me, and they see a hero. Imagine how bad they'd feel if they were wrong.
h2e3231d3gde95g49b9g8390g39163728b535: I reckon I could mutter and mope about till the brain-bug takes me.
ha64a650eg50d2g4b3fg9b64g7e46f750a0a4: But the truth is, I feel fine. Better than fine. And I've no plans to stop fighting the good fight.
hefbfeb02gc43fg46dbg8d83g518f9ebdf0be: You're surprisingly calm. My appearance often provokes a stronger reaction.
h64de4a4cge490g4b36gb431g6a6c1cc88bf4: I've crossed blades with darklings and demons, and they earned every last wound.
h76976138gd41cg4025gb6f9ga15c8f3a0ef8: You're not so scary. I bet you're hiding a smile under those scowls.
hcc634547g6845g4095g9239g59f4f9509d7f: You joined me willingly enough - humans are rarely so trusting.
hadc841cag7916g46fdg9593gb96e9ba791bb: I've known many a soul 'cross the frontiers. And I'm not apt to fear them, friend or foe alike.
h2f956eb7g4829g4954gb20egd6afc2c5fb14: You're surprisingly calm. My appearance often provokes a stronger reaction.
ha9beb369ga6b0g4bf7gb52cga1720a58848f: I've crossed blades with the Gloomstorms of Gracklstugh, and they earned every last wound.
h6cb4c94ageb65g48e5gb28ag5a86f4a01bb1: I've crossed blades with the Gloomstorms of Gracklstugh, and they earned every last wound.
h3021fda1g75d0g4b6bgb8c9ga47df1640f4a: I am used to distrust from your kind. Yet you joined me willingly enough.
he7313821g9dd4g4a99gb0bdg80a8dc29eddc: I've known many a soul 'cross the planes. And I'm not apt to fear them, friend or foe alike.
h1aa40f09gc006g4d48gb83fg63ecfc6eebfb: Give the Blade no reason to doubt you, and he will find no reason to strike.
hdf79af92gf16bg4776g999bgf8c3fe615f08: I am used to distrust from your kind. Yet you joined me willingly enough.
hae19d9a3g6b37g4ec5g8c05g7af714f158ae: I'd like you to wait in the camp for now.
h77ffb610g95cdg4f65gb5bag5bc519d7de00: You sure about that? I'm one-of-a kind!
h30c67b42g4ffcg4108ga4f8gf66f8d341ba5: On second thought, I'd rather you stay with me.
h3586bca1g04aag48e4g8eb5g1ac60c351e22: Whew - you had me worried there!
h5f1552f5g863dg401agb71dga255bcae315c: I'm sure. I'll find you in camp.
h6b85d75ag1f4ag46b2ga564g9e8c926fb561: And just when things were warming up.
h011ab839gce72g4cb9g964fg547bebe8e504: Remain here. I'll come for you if I need to.
h9c7cd76fg7decg45caga8cdg41f4c33edc73: Go to camp and wait for me there.
hc061b7acga08ag45d5g91c9g478d8eba35bc: I'd like you to join me.
h10348b0fg2bb8g48cagb013gc90468e02f9e: Make some room, and I'm all yours. Well - some yours.
